reviews.review_description: This is truely unique game with great soundtrack and amazing visuals. So relaxing game to play. Your hands truely work in here with out issues. Nothing bad to say about this one. It is once in a lifetime experiment!
I really like this game! It's very easy to play, the minimalist style is beautiful and its very calming.  Looking forward to more from this developer!

reviews.review_title: I must have played a different game
reviews.review_description: I thought this game was boring, unimaginative, forgettable, repetitive. I was expecting artistic or at least experimental. It was just generic. Simple shapes and colors. Game never surprised me. Just made more of the same along the way. Hand-tracking adds nothing to the experience.

developer_response.body: @FastLawyer - thanks for giving CONNECTOME a try, even if it didn't resonate with you. If anything, I've heard it was TOO artistic and experimental :) Just shows we all see things differently.

reviews.review_title: A Peaceful and Immersive Escape in VR
reviews.review_description:
CONNECTOME is not just a game — it’s a meditative journey into a world of harmony, light, and sound. From the moment you enter, you're surrounded by calming visuals, immersive scale, and an enchanting soundtrack that gently pulls you into a state of flow.

The core mechanics — connecting dots to form shapes and using intuitive “pinch-to-reveal” gestures — feel natural and deeply satisfying. It’s not about racing or competing, but about discovery, presence, and play. Each moment is peaceful, each animation hypnotic. Excellent way to calm down after a hard core shooting game. Recommended!

developer_response.body: Thank you metaquesta99 for this thoughtful review! I'm really glad CONNECTOME resonated with you like this - that sense of calm and discovery is what I was aiming for, and it means a lot to hear that the gestures and pacing felt right. Appreciate you taking the time to share this! Thanks so much!

reviews.review_description: I really like the gameplay and the level design, it's a rather short experience but quite unique in its conception, its general mechanics and its visual as well as aural ambience. Here's a little gem that stands out from the experiences we're used to seeing.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for this! I'm really glad CONNECTOME stood out to you and appreciate you calling out the ambience - something I poured a lot of love and consideration into.  Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: A fun puzzle game.  Refreshing and relaxing.
Less of a game and more of an experience. Just get it. You'll be happy.

developer_response.body: Haha — yes, just get it! Love that, @Quackbirth. I’m so glad you got it and that it made you happy :) Thanks for encouraging others to do the same!
